name: terminate_runs
full_help:
terminate_runs

Description: 
Terminate the runs

Syntax: 
terminate_runs  [-quiet] [-verbose] <runs>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <runs>      Runs to terminate

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
